title: Improve takt telemetry: per-bead breakdown and cost tracking
description:
When 'takt telemetry --feature-root <id>' is used, the output shows aggregate stats but no per-bead breakdown. Additionally, cost_usd is never aggregated or displayed in the CLI output, even though it is tracked in telemetry artifacts and rendered in the TUI.

Changes needed (all in src/agent_takt/cli.py):

1. aggregate_telemetry() — sum cost_usd from telemetry artifacts (use _collect_bead_telemetry per bead) and include total_cost_usd and avg_cost_usd_per_bead in the returned dict.

2. _format_telemetry_table() — when filters['feature_root'] is set, render a per-bead table showing: bead_id, agent_type, status, wall-clock duration, cost_usd for each bead in the filtered set. Pass the bead list into this function.

3. command_telemetry() — pass the filtered bead list to _format_telemetry_table so it can render per-bead rows.

4. Add cost lines to the aggregate section of _format_telemetry_table (total cost and avg cost per bead) in both scoped and unscoped views.
acceptance_criteria: takt telemetry --feature-root <id> shows a per-bead table with bead_id, agent_type, status, duration, and cost_usd columns
takt telemetry (unscoped) shows total_cost_usd and avg_cost_usd_per_bead in the aggregate section
cost_usd values read from telemetry artifacts match what the TUI shows
takt telemetry --json includes cost fields in the aggregates block
